name: Juggler
description: Presents coding-agent sessions as editable, branching documents instead of a chat log, using CRDT sync and a Miller-columns UI. Go + Wails; BYO key for Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or Ollama. AGPL-3.0.

skills.name: Branching Sessions
skills.description: Structures each agent session as a tree of editable branches so you can fork, revise, and compare approaches.

skills.name: Editable Context
skills.description: Lets you inspect and edit the exact context and tool calls sent to the model before continuing a run.

skills.name: Bring-Your-Own-Key Models
skills.description: Connects to Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or local Ollama models using your own API keys with no vendor lock-in.
